short_summary: Oil prices drop on Iran deal
rationale: The confirmed US-Iran peace deal driving oil prices down is the most relevant event for Portugal, offering potential relief on energy and fuel costs for households and the tourism-dependent economy.

top_events.title: Oil prices fall and shares jump after US-Iran deal announced
top_events.summary: The confirmed US-Iran peace deal is pushing oil prices down, which could meaningfully reduce fuel and energy costs for Portuguese households and support the tourism economy.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain injured 17 people; minor regional safety incident with negligible direct impact on Portuguese daily life.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A large UK-Japan investment deal has no direct impact on Portugal but reflects broader Western economic activity; negligible effect on daily life.
